title: 🧪 FAANG Interview Question on Arrays - Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
content:
```python
## function definition
## Time complexity: O(n)
## Space complexity: O(1)
def findmaxProfit(prices):
    min_price = float('inf')
    max_profit = 0
    
    for i in range(len(prices)):
        if prices[i] < min_price:
            min_price = prices[i]
        elif prices[i] - min_price > max_profit:
            max_profit = prices[i] - min_price
    return max_profit

## Driver code 
prices = [7,5,3,6,4,15,20]
## function calling
maxProfit = findmaxProfit(prices)
print("The maximum profit of buy and sell the stock is:", maxProfit)
```
